overall.description: A first-person walk across an industrial pedestrian bridge in GTA V during a vivid purple sunset. The camera moves through a caged walkway with arched metal supports, turns to observe traffic on the adjacent highway with the Los Santos skyline in the background, then continues toward illuminated industrial storage tanks.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial pedestrian bridge with arched metal framework

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the caged pedestrian walkway with arched metal beams overhead

entered.detail: series of curved metal support beams forming a tunnel-like canopy over the walkway
metal mesh safety fencing running along the left side of the walkway
metal mesh safety fencing separating the walkway from the highway
metal barrier between the pedestrian walkway and the adjacent highway lanes
distant urban skyline with illuminated buildings visible through the bridge structure against the purple sunset

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through an industrial pedestrian bridge during a vivid purple dusk. The walkway is enclosed by chain-link fencing and covered by distinctive curved metal arch supports. The Los Santos city skyline is visible in the distance through the bridge structure, while the adjacent highway runs parallel on the right side.

events.description: camera turns 90 degrees to the right to face the highway traffic
white ambulance with red stripes drives past on the highway

agents.ego_description: standing on the bridge walkway turned toward the highway, watching vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: white ambulance driving along the highway with headlights on

entered.detail: tall yellow street lamps illuminating the highway with warm light

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to face the highway, revealing a panoramic view of traffic moving along the multi-lane road. The purple sunset sky dominates the background above the Los Santos skyline. An ambulance passes by in the foreground, and streetlights cast warm pools of light on the asphalt. The bridge structure is now visible only at the edge of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial bridge approach with storage tanks

events.description: camera turns back to forward-facing direction to continue along the bridge
large illuminated industrial storage tanks become prominent on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the bridge walkway approaching the industrial tank structures

entered.detail: large spherical industrial tanks with illuminated bases and 'Wiwang' signage visible on the structures

segments.scene_description: The camera turns forward again and continues walking along the bridge as the sky darkens to deep purple. Large industrial storage tanks with internal lighting become prominent on the left side, displaying the 'Wiwang' industrial branding. The metal arch structure of the bridge continues overhead while the highway remains visible on the right with occasional passing vehicles.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk across an industrial pedestrian bridge that transitions from a view of the distant city skyline into a close-up approach toward illuminated industrial facilities under a deepening purple sunset. It begins by moving through a caged walkway enclosed by chain-link fencing and curved metal arch supports, with the Los Santos skyline visible in the distance. As the camera turns right, the perspective shifts to a panoramic view of the adjacent highway where an ambulance passes through warm pools of streetlight beneath the vivid dusk sky. The scene then turns forward again, continuing along the bridge as the lighting darkens to a deep purple. Finally, the camera advances toward large, internally lit industrial storage tanks branded with Wiwang, while the highway and metal arches remain as framing elements on the periphery.
